passives.name: Sweet Spot
passives.effects: Basic attacks deal {{pp|0 to 30 for 11|0 to 1000|key=%|type=distance|label1=units}} increased damage and abilities deal {{pp|0 to 40 for 11|0 to 1000|key=%|type=distance|label1=units}} increased damage. The distance is calculated from your {{tip|cr|icononly=true}} current position to the target's position at the time the triggering attack or ability hits them.

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks deal {{pp 0 to 30 for 11 0 to 1000 key=% type=distance label1=units}} increased damage and abilities deal {{pp 0 to 40 for 11 0 to 1000 key=% type=distance label1=units}} increased damage

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Sweet Spot scales damage by distance from the attacker's current position to the target position at hit resolution, not cast start.
Player-visible behavior: both basic attacks and abilities gain larger amplification at longer spacing, with separate max multipliers for attacks (30%) and abilities (40%).
Patch-history verification confirms the amplification should apply to full basic-attack damage resolution, not only one component.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped and acquired through distributed systems (for example anvils, augments, or round rewards) rather than standard shop purchase; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation economy values (total 1000 / sell 400).
